title: fumaria pugsleyana
intro: Fumaria pugsleyana, also known as Pugsley's fumitory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fumariaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant contains alkaloids, particularly fumarine and protopine, which have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, contributing to its health benefits, including its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Fumaria pugsleyana can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for herbal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
